title: cycadaceae
intro: The rank of Cycadaceae refers to a family of plants. Cycadaceae is a family of cycads, a group of ancient and primitive seed-producing plants that are characterized by their palm-like appearance and large, lobed leaves. Members of the Cycadaceae family are generally found in tropical and subtropical regions, and are often associated with rocky outcrops and dry woodlands. With over 300 species, the Cycadaceae family is one of the most diverse and widespread groups of cycads.
